name: Olive Garden Ravioletti in Mushroom/Walnut Cr
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat olive oil in a large skillet over medium heat.
2. Saute mushrooms and walnuts until the mushrooms are golden brown.
3. Add cream and cook, stirring frequently for 5 minutes until slightly thickened.
4. Turn off heat to warm setting. When the cream stops simmering, add pepper and Parmesan and stir until the sauce is smooth.
5. Do not boil.
6. Serve pasta with sauce.
